title: Wake up beautiful at Image Division Beauty & Skincare George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Imagine waking up every...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Imagine waking up every morning with perfectly shaped brows, defined eyes, and softly tinted lips - without make-up.


> At Image Division Beauty & Skincare in George, Nikki van Gend specialises in permanent make-up that enhances your natural features and simplifies your routine.


Nikki’s artistic approach and attention to detail have earned her a loyal following. Whether you’re looking for natural hairstroke brows, subtle eyeliner, or a gentle lip blush, her treatments are tailored to suit your face and personal style.

“Nikki changed my life. I have more confidence now than I ever did - and my brows have never looked this good!” – Carmen L, George

In addition to permanent make-up, Nidene Boshoff offers Lamelle skincare treatments, using powerful South African formulations that treat pigmentation, acne, ageing and more. Combine this with microneedling to boost collagen, refine skin texture, and reveal a radiant, youthful glow.

Every treatment at Image Division is focused on real results and genuine care, whether it’s long-lasting make-up or skin transformation, you’ll leave feeling confident, refreshed, and naturally beautiful.

Confidence starts with great skin and timeless beauty. Let Nikki and Nidene help you find both.

Call or WhatsApp Image Division on 084 7766 667

Follow us on Facebook

Image Division is nominated in the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards as follows:Health, Beauty & Wellness: Best Beauty / Health Spa


> Please vote for us on https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/ before 17 July 2025.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
